summary: Completed frontend testing of MaqManager machine repair management UI. All main features tested successfully including sidebar navigation, dashboard, theme toggle, and all required pages render correctly.
passed_tests: Sidebar renders without Configurações link (as required)
Dashboard page renders with 4 stat cards
Reparações list page renders with DataTable and search functionality
ReparacoesRegisto (new repair form) renders with equipment, parts, client, workflow and financial sections
Clientes page renders with search, new client button and grid layout (shows empty state correctly)
Alarmes page renders with 4 priority filter cards and search functionality
Navigation between all pages works correctly
All 4 navigation links (Dashboard, Reparações, Clientes, Alarmes) are accessible and working
